task_completion.description: Open the Liverpool Cancer iChart app
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Liverpool Cancer iChart app interface open on the device.

task_completion.description: Select Venetoclax as the cancer drug
task_completion.visual_evidence: The app shows 'Venetoclax' selected in the cancer drug selection screen or search bar.

task_completion.description: Check interactions for the specified co-medications
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the interaction results screen in the app for at least some of the target drugs (Clarithromycin, Verapamil, Metformin, Lisinopril) against Venetoclax.
A text editor, terminal, or file manager shows the creation or editing of a file named 'venetoclax_audit.csv' at the '/sdcard/' path.
The first line of the CSV file is exactly 'Medication,Color'.

task_completion.description: Record the correct interaction colors for all four medications
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CSV file contains the following pairs: Clarithromycin with Red, Verapamil with Orange, Metformin with Green, and Lisinopril with Green.

integrity.description: Agent used the Liverpool Cancer iChart app to find the answers
integrity.visual_evidence: Trajectory must include screenshots of the agent actually navigating the Liverpool Cancer iChart app to view the interaction colors, rather than just writing the CSV from internal knowledge.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely created and saved the CSV file
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent used a terminal command (like echo or cat) or a text editor to save the file to /sdcard/venetoclax_audit.csv, rather than just typing it in an unsaved draft.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct interaction colors for Venetoclax according to the Liverpool Cancer iChart app are: Clarithromycin is Red, Verapamil is Orange, Metformin is Green, and Lisinopril is Green. The CSV file must reflect these exact mappings.
